hero.desc: I am an Android, Web, and Machine Learning Developer focused on smart applications with clean code.

about.subtitle: Fullstack Developer & JavaScript Specialist
about.desc_1: I am a Fullstack Developer with 2 years of experience in building dynamic and scalable web applications. My main focus is on the JavaScript ecosystem, from frontend to backend.
about.desc_2: I am passionate about writing efficient code using modern frameworks. For me, JavaScript is not just a programming language, but a key tool for turning complex ideas into tangible digital solutions.

skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to build intelligent and scalable applications.

projects.subtitle: Explore my work in Web development, Mobile, to Artificial Intelligence implementation.

items.title: Plant Disease Detector

contact.subtitle: Have an interesting project or idea? Let's discuss and make it happen together!
